audit_summary.summary_text: The skill is a legitimate Telegram channel configuration tool. It writes a bot token to a local .env file, manages access policies, and provides user guidance. No malicious patterns, hidden instructions, or exfiltration mechanisms were detected. The skill operates entirely within the local filesystem with no network transmission of sensitive data.

vulnerabilities.title: Excessive File System Permissions
vulnerabilities.technical_analysis: The skill requests broad file system permissions (Read, Write, Bash with ls and mkdir) which are necessary for its legitimate function of reading/writing configuration files and creating directories. These permissions are aligned with the stated purpose and do not enable any malicious behavior.
vulnerabilities.impact_assessment: Low risk. The permissions are appropriate for the skill's intended functionality of managing configuration files in ~/.claude/channels/telegram/.
vulnerabilities.remediation: No action required. Permissions are appropriate for the skill's purpose.
